mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, ITEM_NAME, QTY, STATUS, CREATED_AT FROM ORDERS ORDER BY ORDER_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS ( CUSTOMER_NAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, ITEM_NAME, QTY, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{itemName}, #{qty}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}, QTY = #{qty} WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
